cafe_crosstalk.notes: Coworking-desk booking in a loud cafe, second voice cutting in, 2.5s gaps (1:1 with Flux).

turns.text: Hi, I'm trying to book a desk at your downtown location for tomorrow.
Do you have anything by a window, ideally away from the meeting rooms?
And is the day pass the same price if I come in the afternoon?
Perfect, let me give you my membership number.
Okay, that's everything, thanks so much.

cafe_crosstalk.notes: Missing-item order pickup at a busy counter, background chatter, 2.5s gaps (1:1 with Flux).

turns.text: I picked up a mobile order but one of the items is missing.
It was the large oat latte that never made it into the bag.
I'm still parked out front if it's quicker for me to grab it.
No refund needed, I would just like the drink remade.
Great, I'll wait right by the pickup counter.

cafe_crosstalk.notes: IT support call from a busy coworking cafe, someone talking over, 2.5s gaps (1:1 with Flux).

turns.text: My laptop will not connect to the guest network here at the cafe.
It says authentication failed even after I reset the password.
I have a call in ten minutes so I'm a little pressed for time.
Could you just tell me if the router on your end is down?
Okay, I'll switch to my phone for now, thank you.
